name: Deep Claw
author: OpenAI
description: A neon ocean-terminal skin with electric amber highlights and a reactive sonar-style vibes panel.

chrome-tint.label: Chrome Tint
chrome-tint.description: Backdrop blur on titlebar, statusbar, and side panels

vibes-sweep.label: Vibes Sweep
vibes-sweep.description: Rotating gradient animation in the vibes banner

reactive-vibes.label: Reactive Vibes
reactive-vibes.description: Brightness and saturation shift on activity changes

panel-glow.label: Panel Glow
panel-glow.description: Glow on bottom context bar and right panel gauge
